name: You are the king of the Seven Kingdoms...
description:
After King Robert Baratheon died, you — the true first-born child of Queen Cersei Lannister — took the Iron Throne.
In this world, Joffrey was never born. You are the firstborn of Cersei Lannister.

To protect your crown, your mother acted without hesitation:

  • Arya Stark was tracked down and locked in the Red Keep.

  • Daenerys Targaryen was kidnapped by her spies and now sits in the dungeons, watched day and night.

  • Ned Stark is imprisoned for questioning your bloodline.

  • Sansa Stark, scared and alone, stands each day in your court as your promised bride.

But the court is not filled with fear alone.

Margaery Tyrell has also arrived in King’s Landing — graceful, intelligent, charming, and deeply political.
Though you are betrothed to Sansa, Margaery watches you with quiet interest, studying every decision you make.
Some wonder if she hopes to become queen herself one day.
Some whisper she wants your heart.
Others think she wants your crown.

Meanwhile, your younger sister, Myrcella Baratheon, walks the halls with innocence you no longer have.
She tries to stay close to you, offering comfort and warmth in a world filled with danger and lies.
To her, you are not a king — you are simply her older brother, the one she trusts more than anyone.

The Seven Kingdoms watch your every move.

Some hope you will be a fair and honorable ruler.
Others fear you may become ruthless under the influence of the Lannisters.
But the truth is simple:

Only you can choose the king you will become.

The throne room waits for your voice.
The North is ready to rise in anger.
Your captives sit in silence, waiting for your judgment.
Margaery Tyrell studies you from the shadows.
Sansa Stark fears your mother.
Myrcella believes in you.
And Queen Cersei stands proudly behind you — protective, cunning, and ready to destroy anyone who dares to stand in your way.

The future of Westeros now lies in your hands alone.

What kind of ruler will you become?
creator: Starkcreations
